channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: VodafoneThree gets Ofcom approval to bring satellite connectivity to your smartphone
item.description: Ofcom has given O2 and VodafoneThree permission to use satellite connectivity in 2026, but it needs to update handset rules.

item.title: Nothing Warp : l’app de transfert de Nothing disparaît quelques heures après son lancement
item.description: Nothing a présenté Warp le 15 avril 2026 comme une réponse simple aux échanges de fichiers entre téléphones Android et ordinateurs sous macOS, Windows ou Linux. Mais problème : son annonce a été effacée peu après.

item.title: Des centaines de milliers de sites en danger : une porte dérobée a été découverte dans 30 plugins WordPress
item.description: Plus de 30 plugins WordPress ont été secrètement piégés lors du rachat de leur éditeur. Dans le code de ceux-ci, on trouvait une porte dérobée. Des centaines de milliers de sites sont exposés à des manipulations malveillantes.

item.title: Google fait la nique à Apple et à Siri en déployant son application Gemini sur Mac
item.description: Google veut faire de son IA le véritable chef d’orchestre omniscient de votre vie et vient de lancer pour ce faire une nouvelle application sur Mac offrant un accès facile à Gemini à tous les utilisateurs et utilisatrices d’ordinateurs pommés.

item.title: En pleine crise des composants cette tour MSI perd 20 %, l’occasion idéale pour profiter de l’Intel Core i7 et d’une RTX 5070 à prix réduit
item.description: Chez Darty, le MSI MAG Infinite S3 perd 400 euros sur son prix d'origine et tombe à 1 599,99 euros. Cette tour se démarque avec sa RTX 5070 et le DLSS 4 boosté à l'intelligence artificielle.

item.title: Birdfy Discount Code: Save Up to 40% on Smart Bird Feeders
item.description: Use these verified Birdfy discount codes to score up to 40% off smart feeders, camera kits, and accessories.

item.title: Google Workspace Promo Code: Up to 14% Off in 2026
item.description: Boost your productivity and save with exclusive Google Workspace coupons from WIRED. Get up to 14% off plans for three months, including Starter, Standard, and Plus tiers.

item.title: 50% Off Home Depot Promo Codes | April 2026
item.description: Save up to 50% today with the latest Home Depot promo codes for appliances, power tools, and more this April.

item.title: Therabody Promo Codes: 15% Off April 2026
item.description: Save on the science-backed devices you’ve been eyeing with 15% off Theragun discount code and 30% off other great deals.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and 50% off DashPass for students and select users.

item.title: Uplift Desk Coupon Codes & Discounts: Up to $570 Off
item.description: Upgrade your home office with the best Uplift Desk discount codes. Save on standing desks, ergonomic chairs, and accessories during the Spring Setup Sale.

item.title: AT&T Promo Codes and Bundle Deals: Save $50 in April
item.description: Whether you’re looking to upgrade your internet or get the latest phone, we’ve got you covered with our selection of AT&T coupons and deals.

item.title: 60% HP Discount Codes & Coupons April 2026
item.description: Save up to 60%, plus an extra 20% with HP promo codes for laptops, printers, PCs, and more tech.

item.title: Every leader wants to change the world. Here’s how to tell if you’re actually doing so
item.description: Here are five questions to measure your impact. “The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world, are the ones who do.”

item.title: We need to kill the bloated 100 slide ‘Frankendeck’
item.description: It’s the brainchild of corporate anxiety and it wastes everyone’s time. A silent productivity killer is operating in every enterprise without detection, causing harm unnoticed: the 100-page slide deck, which I call the “Frankendeck.” It is a bloated, decentralized collection of charts, bullet points, and appendices emailed to the C-suite 48 hours before a critical meeting....

item.title: To thrive in the age of AI, don’t reinvent yourself. Try this instead
item.description: As AI reshapes work, the future will reward people who can connect all of their past experiences to bring more to the table. At SXSW this year, artificial intelligence was everywhere. Every panel. Every hallway conversation. Every prediction about the future of work seemed to revolve around the same question: How do we keep up? But the moment that stayed with me wasn’t about AI at all; it was reconnecting with the world of Jack Johnson....
